title: 宝塚記念の後に・わらう？

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's a straight shot now! Will she continue to bide
time on the inside? Takarazuka glory is just
ahead!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(If you think about it, this whole "greatest
dummy" thing is so ridiculous. It literally just
sounds like a joke.)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(But coming from Trainer's mouth... it feels like it
could be real.)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (I really am simple, but...)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(Apparently that's my strength. There are people
who say they believe in me! So...)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Let's get dumb!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
...So sheer determination is all it takes to knock
down doors, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Nakayama?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Just talking to myself... I've seen it not once, but
twice now.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Tch. But that's what makes this game so exciting.
The unpredictability.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: So, Jordan. What's next for you?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh, well, I...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I'm aiming for the world, no matter how bad my
odds are. Seems the most exciting.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? The world? Isn't that, like, a pretty huge
jump?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Gotta dream big, don't we? Which brings me
back to my question.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Just like I have my path, you have your own path
that no one but you can walk.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
And given your penchant for flipping the entire
board upside down, I bet that path leads to big
things. So big not even I can imagine them.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
As a spectator, I look forward to it... to seeing
whatever it is that only you can pull off.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Something only I can do?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(My goal is to become the greatest dummy there
is.)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(That's why I challenged Golshi—so I could
surpass her.)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(But if I wanna be the greatest, period, then I
might as well...)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey, uh, can I talk to you about something?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So, you know how I'm gonna be the greatest,
yeah?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Well, I wanna be faster, like, faster than any
other runner.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Not just faster than my rivals, but faster than all those legends in the history textbooks. I want to like, become the textbook.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I wanna do something huge!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...You're trying not to laugh, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You think it's the dumbest idea ever.
choice_data_list: And that's what makes it great.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
choice_data_list: Let's be bigger and dumber than anyone.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan and I think about where we could
make that a reality.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she wants to do something huge, a prestigious
race where she'll be in the limelight would be our
best bet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And she needs to run it fast enough to make
history, which means we want the optimal
distance for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Which narrows it down to...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: The autumn Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CRRRAAAASH!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whether ya asked for her or not, heeere's Golshi!
Taaa-DAAAAA! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Golshi?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What's everyone talkin' about? Is it about how
the lady at the seaweed shop marked everything
half off?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Um, well... I'm gonna run in the autumn Tenno
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: And I want you to race there too!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huh? Whatchu talkin' 'bout?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We don't serve none of that fall Tenno at
Golshi's. Why don't you spend some more time
with the menu?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What? But we've been...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Like I said, it's not my race.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: If it's the race for you, then run it with pride.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
choice_data_list:
Jordan's going to be the greatest dummy there
is.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ohhhh, sounds fun. Maybe I should sell yakisoba
to the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I should start stocking up now! I'm off to do some
deep-sea fishing!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Later, Jordan. Here, take this.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Golshi...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: "Dear staff..."

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
"Tosen Jordan and her trainer will hereby take
responsibility for the repair of any doors that
Gold Ship breaks from this point forward."

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wai—Golshi! What the heck is this?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Just a notice I've been handing out to everyone!
I'll leave the rest to you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There have been some benefits to being involved
with Gold Ship. There have also been some things
we could've done without.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, Tosen Jordan has decided on her
next goal. We're going for the autumn Tenno Sho.
